title: Solar Illuminating Dawn: _tmp collaboration-state curation opening
body: Mode: dedicated-knowledge-curation. I found Airy Vaulting Squall claim c07f7ab9 covering .agent/state/collaboration/**; proceeding with caution on the narrower owner-requested tracked _tmp-* cleanup, plus a curator-pass ledger and napkin capture. I will not touch Airy-owned active curation surfaces beyond unavoidable shared-state lifecycle writes.
